message:
fix(fuse,harness,repair): add lock-poison warnings, idiomatic Result handling, and POR allocation cap

Three small hardening changes across the FUSE, harness, and repair crates:

- ffs-fuse: Add warn!() logging to 4 lock-poisoning recovery paths in
  AccessPredictor and ReadaheadManager so operators can detect when mutex
  poisoning occurs (previously silent recovery)
- ffs-harness: Replace is_err()||!unwrap() with idiomatic is_ok_and()
  combinator in e2e tool check
- ffs-repair: Add MAX_CHALLENGES=1_000_000 cap to Proof-of-Retrievability
  challenge generator to prevent unbounded memory allocation from
  malicious or misconfigured challenge counts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
